strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering
Founder experience with GISCollective shows entrepreneurial drive and long-term ownership
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows at re:cinq
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field (preferred Master's/PhD)
Limited demonstrated track record of shipping recognized AI products or platforms at scale
Career titles top out at Staff/Senior IC; no clear Director-level or Principal-scope influence shown

key_factors.factor: Breadth of engineering experience across stacks

response.justification: Candidate brings broad, hands-on engineering experience spanning 15+ years with founder credentials and recent work on AI-agent tooling, which aligns with parts of the role. However, the resume lacks the recognized AI expertise, advanced AI-related credentials, and Director-level strategic influence typically expected for a Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy.
